CustomField.description: This field captures the system-generated value at the time of MR calculation. It will remain unchanged even if the MR Rate(Esc) is manually updated.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field captures the system-generated value at the time of MR calculation. It will remain unchanged even if the MR Rate(Esc) is manually updated.
CustomField.label: Original MR Rate(Esc)
